title: _index.md runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for the _index.md body-structure contract. Loaded by hooks/post-write-verify.sh (Tier 1 auto-bootstrap + live-sync) and skills/librarian/capabilities/index-maintain.sh (Tier 2 sweep + Tier 3 --deep audit). The k8s ValidatingAdmissionPolicy paramKind for the matcher declared at governance/mandatory-files-rules.json `mandates._index_md`. Design source: target-state/_index.md-design/structural-requirements.json + structural-requirements.md + governance.md. R-37 atomic-lockstep peer with the source files; this runtime artifact is RESOLVED (no PLACEHOLDER markers) and HOOK-OPTIMIZED for jq + bash 3.2 consumption.

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/post-write-verify.sh — Tier 1 auto-bootstrap + live-sync on every Edit/Write tool call to a vault folder; skills/librarian/capabilities/index-maintain.sh — Tier 2 audit sweep + Tier 3 --deep semantic validation (SP05 implements per the SP03-authors-contract / SP05-implements pattern)
_design_notes.lockstep_pair: governance/frontmatter-rules.json#types.index (frontmatter contract; dissolved from schemas/vault-schema.json in SP13 T-4) + governance/mandatory-files-rules.json `mandates._index_md` (matcher + exemption list) + System Governance - Mandatory-Files.md (narrative spoke) + target-state/_index.md-design/* (design source)
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: R-37 atomic lockstep — runtime artifact + frontmatter-rules.json#types.index + mandatory-files-rules.json mandates entry + Mandatory-Files spoke + target-state spec updated in one commit
_design_notes.shape_optimization_for_hooks: Single-document JSON loadable in one `jq` pass; flat keys for sentinel patterns, regexes, columns ordered by `position` (1-indexed); enums resolved to concrete arrays (no PLACEHOLDER strings). Adopter Layer-3 overlays at $CLAUDE_HOME/governance/file-type-contracts/_index.md.adopter.json shadow this file per R-52 with `_override_reason` discipline.

parent_folder.condition_semantics: path_depth = number of segments between vault root and the _index.md file; depth 1 = `<cluster>/_index.md` (parent_folder omitted); depth >= 2 = `<cluster>/<instance>/_index.md` or deeper (parent_folder mandatory).
parent_folder.auto_populate_source: post-write-verify.sh bootstrap step 2 — derived from $FILE_PATH dirname relative to $VAULT_ROOT

parent_folder.rationale: Vault-relative path naming the parent folder of this _index.md

tags.rationale: Folder-mirrors-tag invariant; tag matches the folder's structural-dimension lineage

updated.rationale: ISO-8601 date; bumped by every maintenance pass

provides.rationale: Cross-folder grep handle (R-39); NOT surfaced in contents-enum table

h1.match_rule: must equal the folder name or a close variant (case-insensitive substring match against the parent folder's basename)
h1.rationale: Matches folder name; reinforces folder-mirrors-tag invariant — heading reads like a tag value

folder_context_paragraph.auto_generation_policy: bootstrap emits a placeholder string `*[Folder context paragraph: 2-4 sentences describing what lives here, what doesn't, why the folder exists. Pedagogical.]*` for adopter fill-in; subsequent maintenance passes preserve hand-authored content via survivorship pattern
folder_context_paragraph.rationale: Load-bearing pedagogy content; without it the file is regeneratable boilerplate

sentinel_markers.rationale: Tier 1 + Tier 2 maintenance touches only content between markers; preserves hand-authored prose outside the block

columns.name: File
columns.derivation: filename of the child .md file rendered as Obsidian wikilink

columns.name: Lines
columns.derivation: wc -l on the referenced file at maintenance time; rendered with leading ~ when approximated

columns.name: Type
columns.enum_source: governance/frontmatter-rules.json#types (entry keys excluding underscore-prefixed metadata blocks; dissolved from schemas/vault-schema.json in SP13 T-4)
columns.derivation: extracted from the referenced file's frontmatter `type:` field

columns.name: Description
derivation_fallback_order: first non-frontmatter paragraph of referenced file

ordering_convention.rationale: Key-role types listed before supporting types makes load-priority signal explicit; convention not enforced as DENY — Tier 3 --deep audit flags drift for hand-tune review

light_content_fallback.condition: folder carries fewer than 3 child .md files of distinct types
light_content_fallback.alternative: prose 'Current Contents' section replaces the table
light_content_fallback.rationale: Table enumeration is premature when folder has very few children; prose is more readable

exemption_list_pointer.rationale: Single source of truth for which folders are exempt from _index.md mandate. The post-write hook + librarian index-maintain consume from there at runtime — when a write hits an exempt folder, the hook does not auto-create _index.md and the librarian does not flag missing-index as drift. Exemption changes require R-37 lockstep updating mandatory-files-rules.json + this file's `last_synced_exemption_count` + Mandatory-Files spoke.

consumers.name: post-write-verify.sh
consumers.role: Tier 1 live-sync + auto-bootstrap on Edit/Write tool calls
consumers.loop_guard: if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == */_index.md ]]; then exit 0; fi  (one-line check at hook entry)

consumers.name: index-maintain.sh
consumers.role: Tier 2 audit sweep (auto-fix missing/orphan/drift); Tier 3 --deep semantic validation (description-vs-H1 match, ordering coherence)

tier_1_live_sync.trigger: PostToolUse hook fires on Edit/Write tool calls
tier_1_live_sync.scope: single folder of the written file
writes: auto-bootstrap (if _index.md missing AND folder non-exempt): create with frontmatter stub + H1 + placeholder folder-context paragraph + empty contents-enum table wrapped in sentinel markers
reconcile entry for written file (append/update/refresh row by wikilink)

tier_2_audit_sweep.scope: every non-exempt folder in the vault
writes: add missing rows (new files since last sweep)
correct drifted Type values (frontmatter type: mismatch)
tier_2_audit_sweep.blast_radius: every _index.md in the vault with drift
tier_2_audit_sweep.self_healing_boundary: R-34 — mutations bounded to mechanically-derivable values; descriptions / ordering / exemption decisions NEVER auto-overwritten

writes: FLAGS semantic drift via librarian-finding NDJSON: description-vs-H1 mismatch; ordering incoherence (key-role types not first)
tier_3_deep_audit.blast_radius: same as Tier 2 + advisory findings emitted via librarian-finding output stream
tier_3_deep_audit.auto_overwrite_policy: NEVER auto-overwrites hand-tuned descriptions or hand-ordered rows; flags for operator review
